name: Syft
description: Generates SBOMs from container images and filesystems. Tool: https://github.com/anchore/syft. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #169 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Syft output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Syft output file to parse instead of running it live.
